pattern: For each number, find its maximum digit and construct a same-length repdigit, then sum those values.
hints: Encrypting x means replacing every digit with the largest digit in x, so encrypt(523) = 555.
Find the max digit and the number of digits in x, then the encrypted value is max_digit * (10^digits - 1) / 9.
Sum the encrypted value for every element in nums.

edge_inputs.description: leading digit is not the max
three-digit number where middle digit is max
